name: OrientedBounds2d
summary: The OrientedBounds2d class is a bounding box represented by four Point2d objects, upper left, upper right, lower left and lower right positions.

methods.name: lower_left
methods.summary: The #lower_left method returns the Point2d of the lower left corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.
methods.remarks: The #lower_left method returns the Point2d of the lower left corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.

methods.name: lower_right
methods.summary: The #lower_right method returns the Point2d of the lower right corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.
methods.remarks: The #lower_right method returns the Point2d of the lower right corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.

methods.name: to_a
methods.summary: The #to_a method returns an array which contains the Point2d that define the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.
methods.remarks: The #to_a method returns an array which contains the Point2d that define the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.

methods.name: upper_left
methods.summary: The #upper_left method returns the Point2d of the upper left corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.
methods.remarks: The #upper_left method returns the Point2d of the upper left corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.

methods.name: upper_right
methods.summary: The #upper_right method returns the Point2d of the upper right corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.
methods.remarks: The #upper_right method returns the Point2d of the upper right corner of the Geom::OrientedBounds2d.

properties.summary: The #== method checks to see if the two Geom::OrientedBounds2ds are equal.
properties.remarks: The #== method checks to see if the two Geom::OrientedBounds2ds are equal. This checks whether the point values are the same.
